sources.title: How the Open Knowledge Format can improve data sharing

conflicts_of_interest: same agent performed enumeration and semantic classification
assessment.rationale: A content-addressed, full-period audit over public channel metadata with explicit mutually exclusive rules, per-video hashes, tab receipts, caption admission receipts, and all direct-candidate dispositions. It is suitable for coverage and screening claims, but semantic classification was performed once by the same agent, public YouTube state is mutable, and deleted/private/unlisted videos are unobservable.

sources.license: public metadata compilation; caption bodies excluded because redistribution rights were not verified

Caption bodies were screened but not preserved or promoted.
